detail.overview: A full redesign of the eShop platform using a mobile-first approach, improving conversion rates through better UX patterns and responsive layouts.
detail.outcome: Increased mobile conversion rate by 23% within 3 months of launch.
detail.problem: Users were experiencing high drop-off rates on mobile devices due to a non-responsive legacy design.
detail.process: Conducted user research, created wireframes, collaborated with engineering on implementation, and ran A/B tests to validate improvements.

detail.overview: Built an automated workflow using n8n to handle Gmail-based team notifications, reducing manual effort and improving response times.
detail.outcome: Saved the team 5+ hours per week on manual email processing.
detail.problem: The team was manually triaging and forwarding emails, leading to missed messages and slow response times.
detail.process: Mapped existing email workflows, designed automation logic in n8n, integrated with Slack for notifications, and trained the team on the new system.

detail.overview: Led a comprehensive UX research and redesign initiative for the 104 job seeker platform, focused on improving search discoverability and application flow.
detail.outcome: Improved job application completion rate by 18% and reduced average time-to-apply by 40%.
detail.problem: Job seekers struggled to find relevant jobs quickly, and the application process had too many friction points.
detail.process: Ran user interviews, analyzed funnel drop-off data, prototyped new search & filter patterns, and piloted with a subset of users before full rollout.

detail.overview: Conducted a full UX audit of the Boostime SaaS platform, identifying critical usability issues and providing prioritized recommendations for the product roadmap.
detail.outcome: Delivered a 40-page audit report with 25 actionable recommendations; 12 were implemented in the next sprint.
detail.problem: Users were churning after onboarding due to confusing navigation and unclear feature discovery.
detail.process: Performed heuristic evaluation, ran usability tests with 8 participants, analyzed session recordings, and presented findings to stakeholders.
